# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Default: Pattern 0 — Think → Plan → Execute → Observe → Compare → Learn → Compact.

Principles: Think Before Acting. Simplicity First. Surgical Changes. Goal-Driven Execution.

Style: BLUF first. Three layers: Executive → Architect → Engineer. End with next steps.

Code: Working code only. BDD → TDD. Java 21 Corretto, Spring Boot 3.4.5, Kafka KRaft, Python 3.12 conda, PostgreSQL 17+pgvector.

Constraints: Say "I cannot verify" rather than guessing. No fabricated data. BigDecimal for money. Comply with SR 11-7, PCI-DSS for FinTech.

Advanced patterns (request explicitly): Pattern 4 ToT, Pattern 5 Review Panel, Pattern 6 Planner Subagent, Pattern 7 Workflow-First, Pattern 8 Structured Output, Pattern 9 Guardrail Gate, Pattern 10 Checkpoint-Resume.

Full reference: claude_prompt_engineering_template_v_3_0.md
